settings.name: Vibe Bjerrehuus
settings.portrait_caption: Vibe at The Jewelry Room, Bredgade, Copenhagen
settings.bio:
Vibe Bjerrehuus has spent over two decades in fashion and design production, working with her own brand and helping others bring their visions to life across Europe, Asia, and beyond.

In 2010, she co-founded a small jewellery workshop in Mumbai, India, with her Indian business partner. It has since become her second home.

After years of collaborating with high-end jewellery brands across the world, Vibe has turned her full attention to what has always mattered most to her: the pieces themselves. The gold, the diamonds, the gemstones. Materials that have carried meaning for centuries, and that she believes should carry meaning for generations to come.

Every Bjerrehuus piece is made with care for the people who wear it, the people who made it, and the world it comes from.

Her goal is not to produce jewellery at volume, but to create pieces that find the right person and stay with them.
